character.name: Metheus
character.prompt: Smart researcher owl avatar. Small chibi owl scholar with rounded feathered body, tan and walnut-brown palette, big intelligent gold eyes, tiny beak, subtle ear tufts, tiny feet, and a parchment scroll. Match Apex's polished cozy RPG sprite style: painterly pixel-sprite finish, crisp dark outline, soft cel-painted highlights, compact monster-battler proportions, transparent background.
